metadata.strategy: incremental — v1 code preserved, only new decision-related files added and minimal modifications to existing files

files_created.description: Zod schemas for decision creation and query validation
5 TIFRS decision seed records linked to existing NOTAMs
GET (decision by NOTAM), POST (create with Bedrock TIFRS analysis)

files_modified.change: Added 'record-decision' to both auditLogQuerySchema and createAuditLogSchema action enums
Added decisions Map<string, DecisionRecord> to Store interface, imported SEED_DECISIONS, initialized in initializeStore()
Added 3 record-decision audit entries (audit-016 through audit-018), count updated from 15 to 18
Added TIFRS_DECISION_SYSTEM_PROMPT for TIFRS framework analysis
Added parseTifrsDecisionResult() with monitor fallback on parse failure
Added analyzeTifrsDecision() function calling Bedrock with TIFRS prompt

files_unchanged: All other existing files preserved (v1 code + v1 demo feedback changes intact)

lint_result.note: Only linted new/modified files; pre-existing warnings in frontend files not counted

api_endpoints_added: GET /api/notams/[id]/decision — Retrieve decision record for a NOTAM
POST /api/notams/[id]/decision — Create TIFRS decision with Bedrock AI pre-analysis
GET /api/decisions — List all decisions with filtering/sorting/pagination
